summary: Phase 2 Testing Complete. All 10 Phase 2 features verified via code review + Playwright browser testing. SupportPage Poptávky/Nabídky tabs, create form changes, and Registration improvements all working correctly.

1_poptavky_tab_filter.details: Poptávky tab (data-testid=post-type-filter-request) correctly filters to show only offers where need field is non-empty. Filter logic: baseList.filter(s => s.need && s.need.trim()). 16 items visible in Poptávky tab all had need field populated.

2_poptavky_card_badges.details: On Poptávky tab (isPoptavkyView=true): cards show 'Hledám: [need]' as primary blue badge, 'Nabídím: [offer]' as secondary pink badge. 16 'Hledám:' + 16 'Nabídím:' badges confirmed.

3_nabidky_card_badges.details: On Nabídky tab (isPoptavkyView=false): cards show 'Nabízím: [offer]' as primary pink badge. 16 'Nabízím:' badges confirmed. Secondary 'Hledám:' only shown when need exists.

4_create_form_no_toggle.details: Create offer dialog (data-testid=create-service-btn) shows 'Nová nabídka' title. No post-type toggle or radio buttons. Form hardcodes post_type: 'offer'. Both data-testid=service-offer-input and data-testid=service-need-input found.

5_need_field_optional.details: 'Co hledám výměnou' field (data-testid=service-need-input) has NO required attribute. Label shows '(volitelné)' text. Confirmed required attr is null/absent.

6_offer_with_need_in_poptavky.details: Created test offer with offer='Pomoc s programováním', need='Grafický design'. After creation (toast 'Nabídka vytvořena!'), offer appeared in Poptávky tab as 'Hledám: Grafický design' / 'Nabídím: Pomoc s programováním'.

7_password_confirm_field.details: Registration form has 'Potvrdit heslo' field with data-testid=register-password-confirm-input. Field shows red border on mismatch. Confirmed in screenshot.

8_password_mismatch_error.details: On mismatch: inline error 'Hesla se neshodují' in red text below confirm field. On submit: toast error 'Hesla se neshodují'. Registration correctly blocked.

9_czech_kraje_location.details: Location selector (data-testid=register-location-select) shows 16 options: Nechci uvádět, Praha, Středočeský kraj, Jihočeský kraj, Plzeňský kraj, Karlovarský kraj, Ústecký kraj, Liberecký kraj, Královéhradecký kraj, Pardubický kraj, Kraj Vysočina, Jihomoravský kraj, Olomoucký kraj, Zlínský kraj, Moravskoslezský kraj, Svět. No old city names.

10_avatar_5_groups.details: Avatar picker shows 5 groups visible in registration form: Femininní (4 avatars: fem-pink/lavender/peach/dark), Maskulinní (4 avatars: masc-blue/teal/navy/brown), Neutrální (4: nb-mint/lilac/curly/sage), Zvířata (5: animal-cat/fox/rabbit/panda/owl), Symboly (5: sym-flower/butterfly/rainbow/star/lotus). All groups confirmed in screenshot and code.

critical_code_review_comments: SupportPage: When 'Vše' tab is active, cards with need field show secondary 'Hledám:' badge but the header badge shows 'NABÍDKA' (not 'HLEDÁM'). This is correct behavior by design.
Minor: Some existing test data in Poptávky tab has garbage values like 'Hledám: z', 'Hledám: ja', 'Hledám: nic' from previous test runs. Not a bug, just test data cleanup note.
server.py still ~1825 lines (noted in iteration_11). No new issues found.
seed_data_creation: Created 1 test offer: offer='Pomoc s programováním', need='Grafický design'. It is now visible in Poptávky tab.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 testing complete - all features verified. SupportPage: 3-tab filter (Vše/Nabídky/Poptávky) working. Create form has no post_type toggle, hardcodes 'offer'. Need field is optional. Poptávky shows need-as-primary. Registration: password confirm field, Czech kraje (16 regions), 5 avatar groups (Femininní/Maskulinní/Neutrální/Zvířata/Symboly). Test user: test1@bloom.cz / test123 (admin). Community password: Transfortrans.
